title: Local rugby players chosen for SA Schools teams
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Two rugby players from the...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Two rugby players from the Mossel Bay area, who competed in the U18 Craven and Academy rugby week from 24 to 29 June, have been selected for the South African Schools teams.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Two rugby players from the Mossel Bay area, who competed in the U18 Craven and Academy rugby week from 24 to 29 June, have been selected for the South African Schools teams."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The players selected are Elgernon Meyer (17) from the Great Brak area and Kurt Coetzee (18) from Heiderand, Mossel Bay.","html":"The players selected are Elgernon Meyer (17) from the Great Brak area and Kurt Coetzee (18) from Heiderand, Mossel Bay."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Elgernon, who attends Outeniqua High School in George, was selected for the SA Schools team - the first team - and Kurt, who attends Oakdale Agricultural School, was selected for the SA Schools Academy team, known as the A team, but which is essentially the second team.","html":"Elgernon, who attends Outeniqua High School in George, was selected for the SA Schools team - the first team - and Kurt, who attends Oakdale Agricultural School, was selected for the SA Schools Academy team, known as the A team, but which is essentially the second team."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Kurt is the head boy of Oakdale.","html":"Kurt is the head boy of Oakdale."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Accolades","html":"Accolades"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He has earned himself a number of accolades:","html":"He has earned himself a number of accolades:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"U16 Grant Khomo SWD vice captain 2022","html":"U16 Grant Khomo SWD vice captain 2022"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Oakdale sportsman of the year 2023","html":"Oakdale sportsman of the year 2023"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Most versatile sportsman 2023","html":"Most versatile sportsman 2023"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"U19 Best field athlete 2024","html":"U19 Best field athlete 2024"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"First team rugby 2023 and 2024 and vice captain of the team in 2024","html":"First team rugby 2023 and 2024 and vice captain of the team in 2024"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"U18 Craven Week SWD 2023, 2024","html":"U18 Craven Week SWD 2023, 2024"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"U18 Craven week SWD captain 2024","html":"U18 Craven week SWD captain 2024"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Coach","html":"Coach"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A coach from SWD, Adriaan Jansen, based at Oakdale Agricultural School, has been selected as the conditioning coach for the SA Schools A team.","html":"A coach from SWD, Adriaan Jansen, based at Oakdale Agricultural School, has been selected as the conditioning coach for the SA Schools A team."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The SWD Craven week team only won one of its three matches.","html":"The SWD Craven week team only won one of its three matches."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"They beat the Valke 41-34 in their first game of the tournament, followed by a 19-28 loss to the Sharks, and narrowly lost 40-45 against the Lions in their final match.","html":"They beat the Valke 41-34 in their first game of the tournament, followed by a 19-28 loss to the Sharks, and narrowly lost 40-45 against the Lions in their final match."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"SWD’s Reinhardt Viljoen was chosen as man of the match for the Valke match and SWD's Kai Pratt for the Lions match.","html":"SWD’s Reinhardt Viljoen was chosen as man of the match for the Valke match and SWD's Kai Pratt for the Lions match."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The SWD Academy team beat the Leopards 22-19, lost 34-36 against the Griffons and put on a phenomenal performance against the Border Bulldogs, beating them 106-10.","html":"The SWD Academy team beat the Leopards 22-19, lost 34-36 against the Griffons and put on a phenomenal performance against the Border Bulldogs, beating them 106-10."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Elgernon Meyer","html":"Elgernon Meyer"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
